title: Leonuroides alaschanica
taxonomy: Leonuroides alaschanica is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region in northwest China. The classification of Leonuroides alaschanica is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade angiosperms, clade Eudicots, order Brassicales, family Brassicaceae, genus Leonuroides, and species L. alaschanica. This plant is a member of the Brassicaceae family, which includes other plants like cabbage, mustard, and broccoli. Further research may be necessary for more detailed information on its classification.
